justification: All pass criteria met: boundaries correct (10→heavy via strict <10, 50→freight via strict <50), all 5 ACs covered with explicit AC-to-test mapping in acceptance_criteria_coverage, no external runtime dependencies, no features beyond spec, confidence.level=99 (≥85). Additional boundary values tested (9.99, 49.99, 1000, -1).

observations.text: Boundary logic is correct and well-explained: strict less-than guards ensure 10→heavy and 50→freight
All 5 ACs explicitly mapped to named tests with clear notes
11 tests including boundary values beyond the minimum required
No external dependencies — pure TypeScript as specified
No scope creep — no unrequested features added
NaN assumption transparently documented rather than silently handled
WeightValidationError custom class is a minor addition beyond minimal spec, though reasonable and not a new tier or feature
